step_rationale: Inhibits calcification; modulates plaque inflammation and lipid composition.
mechanism: Fetuin-A suppresses inflammatory and calcification processes in atherosclerotic plaque and contributes to post-MI cardiac dysfunction.

references.title: Prior Exposure to Experimental Preeclampsia Increases Atherosclerotic Plaque Inflammation in Atherogenic Mice-Brief Report.
Novel biomarkers predicting cardiac function after acute myocardial infarction.
